title: Error has occurred when i using Unirest with JSON data

posts.author: thlee (Taeho Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Attempting to create a new item on a particular board but results in an error in the following JSON Data.

[ JSON Data ]

{
    "query": "mutation {
            create_item (
                board_id: ${boardId},
                group_id: "${groupId}",
                item_name: "${itemName}",
                column_values: "{"___9":"Monday "Create Item" Test",}"
            )
            { id
              board {
                id
                name
              }
              group {
                id
                title
              }
            }
        }"
}

[ Testing Environment ]

Using Client : Unirest
Using Language : Kotlin
Using Framework : Spring Boot

Please guide me on why the error occurs and what I should do to correct it.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @thlee,

Would you be able to please send an email to appsupport@monday.com with this full mutation + the response you are getting from our server?

We can take a look from there

Cheers,
Matias
